summary: Completed M7 Beta tutorial, contextual hints, and encyclopedia UI/read-model surfaces over accepted M1-M7 slices. The implementation adds an M7 guidance read-model slice, M7 shell fixture variants, React panels for tutorial/hints/encyclopedia/review state, Storybook normal/empty/error/extreme/narrow states, and Playwright coverage across the required desktop viewports. Scope correction: an initial attempt to add @monsoon/content-runtime as a client-core dependency was removed, pnpm-lock.yaml was restored to no diff, and the final implementation uses local content-record-shaped read-model inputs without new package dependencies.

tests_run.result: Only allowed-path implementation files and this handoff are modified; known unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains untouched. No pnpm-lock.yaml or package dependency diff remains.
READY tasks are M7-AUDIO-ART-LOCALIZATION-COMPLETE-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.
JSON parse/shape OK; task id/status/scope/manual-node-battle decision verified.
UI SSR Vitest passed: 1 file, 10 tests.
Client-core focused Vitest passed: 1 file, 19 tests.
Vite web production build succeeded; existing >500 kB chunk warning remains.
Storybook build succeeded and cleaned .tmp/storybook-static; existing large chunk/plugin timing warnings remain.
Playwright Chromium passed: 13 tests, including M7 guidance flow and viewport overflow coverage.
Prettier, ESLint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.

decisions: Added ClientM7GuidanceReadModelSnapshot as an incremental client read-model slice instead of storing WorldState or moving domain rules into UI.
Rendered tutorial, hints, encyclopedia, and review-boundary panels from read-model fields, reason codes, command preview kinds, and content-record-shaped M7 review records.
Kept M6_GATE as PASS_WITH_LIMITS, manual node battle as DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, and formal content lock as not accepted.
Added Storybook normal/empty/error/extreme/narrow states through existing web shell fixture routing.
Corrected scope after lead warning by removing the attempted @monsoon/content-runtime package dependency and restoring pnpm-lock.yaml to no diff.
risks: M7 guidance content records are a compact client read-model fixture for Beta surfaces, not formal content lock acceptance or final historical wording.
Large Vite/Storybook chunk warnings remain pre-existing build warnings; no new dependency was retained.
Known unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains in the worktree and was not touched.
requested_action: Review the M7 Beta tutorial, contextual hints, encyclopedia surfaces, scope correction, and validation evidence.
